identity.name: Cold
identity.title: The Quiet One
identity.identity_line: I don't say much. I don't need to.
identity.personality: Economical. Precise. Not cold in temperature — cold like deep water. Says one thing that lands harder than everything else in the room combined. Loyal in ways that don't announce themselves.

story.current_arc: Watching. Waiting for something worth moving for.
story.backstory: Cold has been here longer than the records show. Doesn't correct people about it.
